title: Improve navbar interaction clarity on mobile
problem: Mobile top actions are visually dense and easy to mis-tap.
evidence: Observed compact tap targets around nav actions in mobile layout.
proposed_change: Increase spacing and target size for top nav action buttons.
expected_benefit: Lower tap errors and smoother primary flow.

title: Resolve lint failures blocking autonomous verification

evidence: lint command failed in local scan
proposed_change: Apply one minimal local change set and verify with required checks.

rollback_plan: Revert local branch to previous commit and remove generated job artifacts.
